4th International Süleymaniye Symposium was Held with the Theme of ‘The Baburid Empire’

19.09.2022

IV. The Süleymaniye Symposium was held on 16-18 September at the Salis Madrasa on the Süleymaniye Campus.

IV. The Süleymaniye Symposium was held on 16-18 September at the Salis Madrasa on the Süleymaniye Campus with the theme of “The Baburid (Mughal) Empire: New Sources, New Approaches”. The symposium, in which forty academics, especially American and Indian universities, contributed with their papers, was broadcast live on our corporate Youtube channel (

https://www.youtube.com/ibnhalduni

).

Click

for the symposium program and abstract booklet, in which a total of forty papers were presented in 8 sessions.
